blocks.html: "AI" sounds mysterious, but at its heart, most AI programs just follow rules to make decisions — the trick is writing rules clever enough to feel smart.
Let's build a tiny "smart" program that gives advice based on the weather. This is a real (if simple) form of AI: a rule-based system.

blocks.label: Run Code

blocks.html: More advanced AI (like the assistant you're chatting with right now!) uses patterns learned from huge amounts of data instead of hand-written rules — but the basic idea is the same: take an input, make a decision, give an output.
Write a function movie_recommendation(age) that returns a different movie genre suggestion depending on the age given (try 3 age ranges with if/elif/else).
